---
title: Expected Error Test
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      shouldError: default
      printsMessage:
        level: ERROR
        regex: "unexpected character"
---

This document has unclosed YAML that will cause a parse error.

```{python}
# This would require execution which is disabled
print("hello")
```

::: {.callout-note
Unclosed div - missing closing brace
